meta.name: LUAD Perturbation Layer
meta.description: Causal inference overlay on LUAD KEGG pathway graph. Tripartite graph: mutation → gene → pathway. Augmented KEGG pathway nodes include DepMap-derived aggregates and inferred causal state from DepMap mutation profiles.

pathway_nodes.label: MAPK signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Core oncogenic signaling cascade; activated via EGFR/KRAS mutations in NSCLC

pathway_nodes.label: Chemokine signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Immune cell recruitment; drives tumor microenvironment remodeling

pathway_nodes.label: Cytokine-cytokine receptor interaction
pathway_nodes.description: Inflammatory signaling network; cross-talks with chemokine and MAPK pathways

pathway_nodes.label: Vascular smooth muscle contraction
pathway_nodes.description: Tumor vasculature remodeling; linked to invasion and metastasis

pathway_nodes.label: Regulation of actin cytoskeleton
pathway_nodes.description: Cell motility and invasion; fully upregulated in lung tumor samples

pathway_nodes.label: Endocytosis
pathway_nodes.description: EGFR receptor trafficking and recycling; promotes sustained signaling

pathway_nodes.label: Neuroactive ligand-receptor interaction
pathway_nodes.description: Nicotinic acetylcholine receptors; linked to smoking-associated lung carcinogenesis

pathway_nodes.label: Tight junction
pathway_nodes.description: Epithelial barrier disruption; associated with EMT in lung cancer

pathway_nodes.label: Axon guidance
pathway_nodes.description: Invasion guidance signals; repurposed in lung tumor invasion

pathway_nodes.label: PI3K-Akt signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Top enriched pathway; early and reversible activation event in lung carcinogenesis

pathway_nodes.label: TNF signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: NF-κB activation; promotes survival and drug resistance in NSCLC

pathway_nodes.label: Cell cycle
pathway_nodes.description: Strongly repressed; G2/M checkpoint arrested by GADD45B overexpression

pathway_nodes.label: P53 signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Tumor suppressor pathway; repressed enabling bypass of apoptosis

pathway_nodes.label: Metabolic pathways
pathway_nodes.description: Aerobic glycolysis (Warburg effect); central crosstalk hub in pathway network

pathway_nodes.label: Pathways in cancer
pathway_nodes.description: Meta-pathway integrating all major oncogenic routes; central hub

pathway_nodes.label: Focal adhesion
pathway_nodes.description: Cell-matrix adhesion signaling; impact factor 9.28, central crosstalk hub

pathway_nodes.label: Drug metabolism – cytochrome P450
pathway_nodes.description: Carcinogen and drug biotransformation; central hub governing treatment efficacy

pathway_nodes.label: Antigen processing and presentation
pathway_nodes.description: Immune evasion mechanism; central hub in crosstalk network

pathway_nodes.label: ECM-receptor interaction
pathway_nodes.description: Matrix remodeling; impact factor 14.27, top enriched crosstalk hub

pathway_nodes.label: Complement and coagulation cascades
pathway_nodes.description: Highest impact factor (17.26); complement C5a promotes tumor microenvironment

pathway_nodes.label: EGFR signaling
pathway_nodes.description: Primary driver mutation source in NSCLC; ~15% activating mutations

pathway_nodes.label: RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK pathway
pathway_nodes.description: KRAS mutated in ~30% of NSCLC (esp. adenocarcinoma); BRAF in ~2-3%

pathway_nodes.label: JAK-STAT3 signaling
pathway_nodes.description: STAT3 required for EGFR-driven oncogenic effects in NSCLC

pathway_nodes.label: Wnt signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Tumor progression and stem cell maintenance in lung cancer

pathway_nodes.label: Notch signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Differentiation and proliferation; altered in ~10% of lung cancers

pathway_nodes.label: VEGF signaling pathway
pathway_nodes.description: Tumor angiogenesis; target of bevacizumab therapy

pathway_edges.description: GADD45B bridges MAPK activation and cell cycle repression
GADD45B mediates crosstalk between MAPK activation and P53 repression
Both repressed pathways share GADD45B as a key DEG
FGF family genes shared between MAPK and actin cytoskeleton regulation
EGFR endocytosis feeds back to MAPK pathway activation
Cytoskeletal machinery shared with endocytic trafficking
Tight junction dissolution linked to actin remodeling during EMT
Extensive gene sharing between cytokine and chemokine arms
Adrenergic and guanylyl cyclase receptors shared between pathways
Myosin and actin isoforms bridging tight junction and smooth muscle
CXCL14 links immune chemotaxis and invasive guidance signals
G-protein beta-gamma subunit shared between pathways
AKT3 shared node connecting chemokine and MAPK arms
PIK3CG links chemokine-driven signaling to cytoskeletal changes
GIT2 bridges chemokine receptor internalization and endocytosis
CXCL14 shared across immune and guidance pathways
EGFR connects cytokine signaling to MAPK cascade
EGFR drives both cytokine receptor interaction and receptor endocytosis
Complement receptor shared with neuroactive ligand network
Beta-arrestin mediates receptor internalization across both pathways
AKT3 shared between tight junction signaling and chemokine pathway
PKC isoforms activate MAPK from vascular signaling context
EGFR is the upstream activator of MAPK/RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK cascade
EGFR activates PI3K-Akt in parallel to RAS-MAPK
AKT feeds back into MAPK pathway cross-activation
RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK is a sub-module of the broader MAPK pathway
Cytokine signals (IL-6) activate JAK-STAT3 axis
VEGF receptor signals through PI3K-Akt for endothelial survival
VEGFR2 activates ERK1/2 branch of MAPK signaling
Pathways in cancer meta-pathway encompasses EGFR oncogenic axis
Wnt/beta-catenin is a core component of the pan-cancer pathway
TNF-induced TRAF2 activates MAPK kinase cascade
GADD45B upregulation in activated MAPK leads to P53 pathway suppression
ECM binding to integrins directly activates focal adhesion kinase
FAK-SRC complex at focal adhesions activates RAS-MAPK
FAK activates PI3K-Akt downstream of integrin signaling

perturbation_edges.description: KRAS p.G12D alters KRAS (gain of function) in 8.1% of LUAD lines
KRAS p.G12C alters KRAS (gain of function) in 14.9% of LUAD lines
BRAF p.V600E alters BRAF (gain of function) in 4.6% of LUAD lines
EGFR p.L858R alters EGFR (gain of function) in 6.9% of LUAD lines
JAK2 p.V617F alters JAK2 (gain of function) in 4.6% of LUAD lines
KRAS p.G12 alters KRAS (gain of function) in 28.7% of LUAD lines
KRAS p.G13 alters KRAS (gain of function) in 11.5% of LUAD lines

PIK3CA p.E542 alters PIK3CA (gain of function) in 5.8% of LUAD lines

PIK3CA p.H1047 alters PIK3CA (gain of function) in 4.6% of LUAD lines

RB1_LoF alters RB1 (loss of function) in 52.9% of LUAD lines
TP53_LoF alters TP53 (loss of function) in 93.1% of LUAD lines
PTEN_LoF alters PTEN (loss of function) in 49.4% of LUAD lines
APC_LoF alters APC (loss of function) in 50.6% of LUAD lines
